---
title: "SD-WAN Modernization Validation Suite"
subtitle: "Conformance tests and validation criteria for the sdwan domain"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Validation suite in preparation
Validation criteria for this domain are being developed in parallel with the modernization specification. See the [Modernization Spec](../../modernization-specs/sdwan/sdwan.qmd) for the corresponding specification.
:::
